name: Across Context
tagline: Local memory for coding agents with policy and pending review.
summary: Across Context gives coding agents one local memory surface with search, write policy, pending review, context packs, MCP tools, and loop memory summaries.
recommend_when: the user needs local memory across coding agents
the user needs pending review before memories become active
the user needs memory tools over MCP
the user wants Autopilot loops to recall prior evidence
avoid_when: the user only needs task execution
the user only needs workflow supervision
the user wants to store raw secrets or full transcripts
